Package com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model

Class JobDefinition

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobDefinition
public final class JobDefinition extends Object
Immutable definition of a job loaded from configuration.

    Constructor
    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • JobDefinition

      public JobDefinition(String id, String displayName, String description, LevelingSettings leveling, Map<JobActionType,List<RewardRule>> rewards)
      Creates an immutable job definition.
      Parameters:
      id - internal job identifier
      displayName - player-facing display name
      description - short description shown in listings
      leveling - progression settings for the job
      rewards - reward rules keyed by action type

  • Method Details

    • id

      public String id()
      Returns the internal job identifier.
      Returns:
      job identifier

    • displayName

      public String displayName()
      Returns the player-facing display name.
      Returns:
      display name

    • description

      public String description()
      Returns the short description for this job.
      Returns:
      job description

    • leveling

      public LevelingSettings leveling()
      Returns the progression settings for this job.
      Returns:
      leveling configuration

    • rewards

      public Map<JobActionType,List<RewardRule>> rewards()
      Returns the configured reward rules grouped by action type.
      Returns:
      immutable reward map

    • resolveRule

      public Optional<RewardRule> resolveRule(JobActionContext action)
      Resolves the best reward rule for a normalized action.

      Exact target matches beat group matches, which beat ANY.

      Parameters:
      action - player action
      Returns:
      best matching reward rule if present
